title: REI These pics R for FUN ONLY No political views r intended
display_title: REI These pics R for FUN ONLY No political views r intended
wikitext:
[]: REI-These pics R for FUN ONLY -No political views r intended             Quote Post by JinKazama » Sun Dec 04, 2005 12:52 am Again I will say loud and clear again : These pictures are made for FUN ONLY - No political views were intended whatsoever, thanks & have a good laugh at these pictures. 8) [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Dec 04, 2005 1:09 am First Gendo now this. Rei you need to learn to avoid certain kinds of men.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 04, 2005 2:02 am *raises eyebrow*

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Sun Dec 04, 2005 2:42 am I fucking love it!

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:25 am Am I the only person who finds these pics offensive? I mean seriously, Rei is really offending to me. The Rei-ist movement was just pathetic. Now Asukaism, there's a movement that can turn some heads. Though I ask one thing... What about the 'stache?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:39 am NYUU APPROVES

[]: Rei with mustashe             Quote Post by JinKazama » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:39 am Rei with mustashe closeup 8) [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:39 am Looks ultra-strange....

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sun Dec 04, 2005 2:58 pm Thats some pretty funny stuff there.

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:28 pm Isn't there a thread on these forums in which someone posted scans from a Japanese book that had actual artwork(not photoshop) of Evangelion characters in Nazi uniforms? Ryo wrote: NYUU APPROVES

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:16 pm Heidroch wrote: Isn't there a thread on these forums in which someone posted scans from a Japanese book that had actual artwork(not photoshop) of Evangelion characters in Nazi uniforms?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Dec 04, 2005 9:17 pm Even though its supossed to be funny I think its just an insult to the people that died during World War 2. And I didnt find it funny either

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Dec 04, 2005 10:32 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: Even though its supossed to be funny I think its just an insult to the people that died during World War 2. And I didnt find it funny either

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Dec 05, 2005 2:49 am Ridiculing ruthless dictators doesn't really seem like an insult to me. It was actually used at the time quite a bit, for instance, in Charlie Chaplin's "The Great Dictator" or any of the infamous WW2 cartoons (for instance, here: http://www.livejournal.com/users/shiranami/406926.html). Humor's an important part of dealing with staggering events.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Dec 05, 2005 1:49 pm These remind me of Rich Anderson's old "Key The Metal Idol," satire "Key The Right-Wing Radio Talk-Show Host."

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Dec 05, 2005 2:01 pm Heidroch wrote: Ryo wrote: NYUU APPROVES

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Dec 05, 2005 2:42 pm Wangman? :shock: -I'm scared now.....

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Dec 05, 2005 2:57 pm Why did you choose Rei? Asuka seems more like a dictator.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Dec 05, 2005 6:44 pm ...I didnt laugh... I mean, I laugh at hitler even though i'm jewish, but this wasnt funny. This was stupid. You wasted 3 minutes of my life, and I want it back.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Dec 06, 2005 1:44 pm *kneels* HAI O Rei!
